open_core_contract: Hosted cells run the same memphant-server, memphant-worker, and /v1 API behavior as self-hosted deployments.

hooks.name: tenant.provision.requested
hooks.cell_action: create tenant with immutable region before issuing API keys

hooks.name: tenant.region.resolve
hooks.cell_action: return home_region only; never return memory payloads

hooks.name: billing.metered_event.recorded
hooks.cell_action: emit PII-stripped metering event after the core API transaction commits

hooks.name: tenant.status.changed
hooks.cell_action: apply admission status without deleting tenant memory
